title: 星地协同，问答无界——复旦大学空间互联网研究院与天智研究院强强联手世界人工智能大会
description: SatAgent将卫星互联网从“人寻求知识”提升为“知识主动服务人”，将广域连接升级为能够自主理解、自主决策、自主协作的智能网络。
titleZh: 星地协同，问答无界——复旦大学空间互联网研究院与天智研究院强强联手世界人工智能大会
titleEn: Satellite-Terrestrial Synergy, Boundless Q&A — Fudan University's Institute of Space Internet and Sky Intelligence Join Forces at WAIC
descriptionZh: SatAgent将卫星互联网从“人寻求知识”提升为“知识主动服务人”，将广域连接升级为能够自主理解、自主决策、自主协作的智能网络。
descriptionEn: SatAgent elevates satellite internet from "people seeking knowledge" to "knowledge proactively serving people," upgrading wide-area connectivity into an intelligent network capable of autonomous understanding, autonomous decision-making, and autonomous collaboration.
